scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && eslint src/ --max-warnings 0 && node esbuild.config.mjs production && cp manifest.json src/styles.css dist/
scripts.release: npm run build && mkdir -p dist/skills && cp manifest.json src/styles.css README.md dist/ && cp -r skills/flowtime/ dist/skills/flowtime/; echo 'Release ready at dist/'
